mapper.select:
SELECT p.product_id, p.category_id, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.image_url, p.brand, p.status, p.created_by, p.updated_by, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.deleted_at, c.name AS category_name, COALESCE(i.quantity, 0) AS stock_quantity FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.category_id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN inventories i ON i.product_id = p.product_id
p.deleted_at IS NULL
AND p.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY p.product_id DESC

SELECT p.product_id, p.category_id, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.image_url, p.brand, p.status, p.created_by, p.updated_by, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.deleted_at, c.name AS category_name, COALESCE(i.quantity, 0) AS stock_quantity FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.category_id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN inventories i ON i.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.product_id = #{productId}
